   "reasoning": "We're burning out - fast. I need stability now. Let's throw some budget at the remaining staff to keep them on board, reallocate what we have to make sure everyone gets what they need, and get a handle on attendance. Counseling programs are a must - those are cheap, effective, and look good. Staff hiring's a risk - those teachers are expensive and hard to get rid of. I'll take the incremental scholarship program, but let's not break the bank.",
   "confidence": 0.8
}
